sentences.translation: Sport je veoma koristan za ljudsko tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: Sports are very beneficial for the human body.

sentences.arabic: أُمَارِسُ التَّمَارِينَ فِي النَّادِي ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Vježbam u teretani tri puta svake sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: I exercise in the gym three times every week.

sentences.arabic: أُحِبُّ الْمَشْيَ فِي الطَّبِيعَةِ لِأَنَّهُ يُقَلِّلُ التَّوَتُّرَ.
sentences.translation: Volim šetati u prirodi jer to smanjuje stres.
sentences.translationEn: I love walking in nature because it reduces stress.
